title: WUWA OST
description: This is a music pack that changes Minecraft background music and menu background wallpaper
body:
If you're playing with mods like "biomes of plenty" or any mod like it the music pack may not work on that mods biomes, but vanilla biomes or biome mods like terralith the music pack works fine. 

This pack was inspired by "Sounds of Hydro." A good music pack, I recommend it.
